answer.text:
Hi Janet,

The service scope in the agreement is CRS, while in the booking freight is AEU, which doesn't match, so the calculation cannot be performed.
Please confirm with the trade team which one is correct.


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/>
